entity.summary: Cross-chain automated-market-maker protocol using one canonical liquidity and pricing state across multiple EVM and SVM execution environments.
entity.notes: HEI records Skate AMM as the parent exchange identity across supported chains rather than creating chain-specific entities. Current first-party documentation describes the unified-liquidity design, and independent metrics report current multi-chain TVL, fees, and volume.

evidence.title: Skate AMM official website and fundamentals
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Skate AMM as the flagship cross-chain AMM with one unified price and liquidity state across connected chains.

evidence.title: Skate AMM protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics report non-zero TVL, fees, and recent DEX volume across Sui, BNB Chain, Solana, Monad, Base, Arbitrum, and other deployments.
